2024-25 Seton Hall Pirates Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 7-25 (2-18, 11th in Big East MBB)

Coach: Shaheen Holloway

PS/G: 61.6 (363rd of 364)

PA/G: 70.2 (120th of 364)

SRS: -0.26 (153rd of 364)

SOS: 8.36 (59th of 364)

ORtg: 94.0 (359th of 364)

DRtg: 107.2 (253rd of 364)

Preseason Odds: Championship +15000
